**Commit**: `c15e0aac7d07` — chore(phase-01): /redteam round 3 — fixes verified, convergence counter at 1

**Body**:

Round 3 (post-R2-H-fix verification + expanded adversarial
framing on shards 6/7/16). Result: 0 CRIT + 0 HIGH + 2 MED +
2 LOW. Both R2-H-01 + R2-H-02 fixes PASS verification.

R2-H-01 verification PASS:
- _to_spec_wire_form() helper at shard 5 § 4 lines 240-271
  translates upstream 1-key {algorithm: ed25519+sha256} to spec
  3-key {sig, hash, shamir}
- Single emission point via _with_algorithm_id() line 287
- test_producer_verifier_wire_shape_round_trip.py named in plan
  02 § EC-9 line 289
- Build-sequence step 5a cites the helper landing BEFORE
  persistence
- Shard 6 § 4 lines 248-256 inherits 3-key form transitively
- No NEW orphan introduced

R2-H-02 verification PASS:
- 5-stub partition correct: HeartbeatClient.maybe_record_flag()
  is a TRUE no-op (literal pass) + 4 PhaseDeferredError modules
  for network/crypto
- 21 emit sites at shard 17 § 7.6 invoke ONLY
  client.maybe_record_flag(...)
- test_heartbeat_stub_no_op_wiring.py + regression-grep
  test_no_envoy_heartbeat_phase02_module_call_sites.py named in
  plan 02 § 3.6a
- Plan 03 lines 404-410 ships the 5-module split
- No NEW orphan

Adversarial framing on shards 6/7/16 surfaced ZERO HIGH/CRIT.
Shard 16 returned zero findings — webhook-signer INBOUND
verification, per-message principal binding via Trust store, and
the structural ban on parallel session-state caches are all
explicit and mechanically enforced.

Two MEDs surfaced (carry-forward to /todos planner):
- R3-M-01: spec § 4 line 140 names general (i,j) swap mutation
  but plan 02 EC-4 line 150 only enumerates K, K+1 adjacent
  reorder. Test enumeration gap.
- R3-M-02: specs/independent-verifier.md line 35 mandates 4-key
  form for export-bundle segment-boundary algorithm_identifier
  (vs trust-chain 3-key form). Shard 6 Ledger design produces
  3-key. Cross-spec sibling check between additive
  independent-verifier.md (drafted at shard 22) and shard 6 had
  the gap. Recommend /todos planner reconcile (likely revise the
  additive verifier spec — drafted in this analyze cycle, no
  cross-references yet, low MUST Rule 5b risk).

All 9 mechanical sweeps re-derived from scratch.
All 25 cited GitHub issues verified at expected state.
Upstream kailash.trust.signing.algorithm_id.py line 108 still
emits 1-key form (R2-H-01 fix remains load-bearing).
kailash[shamir,nexus,kaizen] extras excludes kailash-ml.

Convergence counter: round 1 = 0/0 (counter 1); round 2 = 0/2
(counter reset); round 3 = 0/0 (counter 1, post-fix). Round 4
required as convergence finalizer; if round 4 returns 0/0, EC-6
closes (consecutive 0/0 × 2 met).
